docs.title: DiversityLens
docs.text: This tool can be used to visualize the datasets which include human faces.

docs.title: src.dataset_loader
docs.text: This module is responsible for searching and listing all relevant files(images/videos) in a given dataset directory. In will be used as the first step in order to create a demopgraphic analysis.

docs.title: VIDEO_EXTENSIONS = {'.mp4', '.avi', '.mov', '.mkv', '.webm'} class-attribute instance-attribute
docs.text: This class' functions can be used to manipulate the dataset.

docs.title: __init__(dataset)
docs.text: :param dataset: Path to the dataset directory.

docs.title: find_images()
docs.text: This function finds the images in a given path. :return: List of image file paths.

docs.title: find_videos()
docs.text: This function finds the videos in a given path. ::return: List of videos file paths.

docs.title: src.demographic_estimator
docs.text: This module is responsible for estimating age, gender, and race using DeepFace. It acts as a wrapper for the deep learning model.

docs.title: analyze_image(image_path)
docs.text: This function takes an image path and returns a LIST of demographic info for all faces found. :param image_path: Path to the image file. :return: List of dictionaries with demographic information for each face.

docs.title: analyze_video(video_path, skip_frames=30)
docs.text: This function takes a video path and analyzes frames periodically. :param video_path: Path to the video file. :param skip_frames: Number of frames to skip (e.g., 30 for approx 1 sec if FPS is 30). :return: List of dictionaries with demographic information for each face found.

docs.title: src.visualization
docs.text: This module is responsible for visualizing the demographic data using Bokeh. It generates an interactive HTML dashboard directly from memory.

docs.title: __init__(data_list, output_dir)
docs.text: :param data_list: List of dictionaries containing demographic data. :param output_dir: Directory where the dashboard.html will be saved.

docs.title: src.main
docs.text: This module is responsible for being the backbone of the project that merges other modules.
